name: glob
label: glob
description: Find files using ripgrep file discovery: rg --files -g '<pattern>' <path(s)...>.
promptGuidelines: Use glob for fast file discovery.
.git internals are always excluded from results.

patterns.description: Optional glob pattern(s) used to match files. Each pattern is passed as `-g <pattern>`; use `!` for exclusions. If omitted, no glob filters are applied.

paths.description: Path(s) to search in. Provide one or more directories. If omitted, the current working directory is used.

limit.description: Maximum number of files to return. If omitted, the default limit is {{defaultLimit}}.

depth.description: Maximum directory traversal depth relative to each search path. If provided, passes `--max-depth <depth>`. If omitted, traversal is unlimited.

noIgnore.description: Include files ignored by .gitignore, .ignore, or other ripgrep ignore rules. If true, passes `--no-ignore`. If omitted, defaults to false.

visibleOnly.description: Search only non-hidden files and directories. If omitted or false, hidden files are included by default.
